item.name: Unicorn Whistle
item.description: This whistle emits a shrill tone that is said to summon a legendary unicorn. Rainbow-colored barding optional.

mount.name: Unicorn
mount.action: Summon forth the single-horned steed you befriended in the Black Shroud.
mount.description: Not long ago, Eorzean unicorns numbered in the thousands, and could oft be seen roaming the Coerthas highlands in great majestic herds that would render the mountains white as snow. Poaching has caused the population to decline, and if it were not for your act of kindness, there would be one fewer.
mount.tooltip:
Your precious horses,
they're just unicorns with
a big empty forehead.
- Chief Chocowacker
